description: Style Note puma gives you shoes that will make you want to go on a run with these stylish shoes. Designed for maximum comfort and easy using, these pair of shoes raises your style quotient while out for your regular run. Look good and feel even better with these trendy Osu running shoes. Product Details Round blunt pink slip on shoes Mesh and fabric upper with black, striped overlays Fabric interiors with padding at the mouth and a cushioned footbed Foamy rubber midsole TPU outsole with patterned flex grooves  Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight or machine wash
